constraints.messageTemplate: Work order '{title}' is past scheduled date

constraints.name: warnCriticalUnassigned
constraints.messageTemplate: Critical work order '{title}' has not been assigned

value.value: Work order must be open to assign
Work order must be open or assigned to start
Work order must be in progress to complete
Cannot cancel a completed or already cancelled work order
Cannot reprioritize a closed work order
Cannot reschedule a closed work order

policies.name: ManagersCanCancelWorkOrders
policies.message: Only managers can cancel work orders
